name: What Are LEADING LINES in Photography: A How-To-Guide

step.name: Scout
step.text: Walk the location; look for paths, edges and shadows. Kneel or go low.

step.name: Lens & distance
step.text: Choose 14–35 mm (full frame) to exaggerate lines; step closer.

step.name: Subject placement
step.text: Place the subject at the line’s destination; avoid merges on edges.

step.name: Exposure
step.text: Base ISO 100/200 if possible; raise ISO to keep shutter safe.

step.name: Composition check
step.text: Check corners for bright lines exiting the frame.
